analysis: The policy chunk provides the information required by Art 13(1)(f) regarding international transfers by referencing the use of EU Standard Contractual Clauses (Art 46(2)(c)) and providing a contact email for further information. The omission of the mention of adequacy decisions is a completeness deviation and is skipped per Rule 4.

The policy chunk addresses the requirements of Art 14(1)(f) for data not collected from the subject by specifying the safeguards (SCCs) used for international transfers. Active statements are compliant; omissions of other required info are skipped per Rule 4.
